headline: Congress goes quiet on summer schedule as Senate and House break until Monday!

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate met briefly in pro forma session on Thursday and adjourned until Monday. No votes or substantive business was conducted.

onTheFloor.title: Circuit Court Judge nomination for the Second Circuit
District Court Judge nomination for the Southern District of Texas
onTheFloor.status: confirmation vote scheduled for 5:30 PM Monday

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met at 3 p.m. and adjourned at 3:03 p.m. on Thursday, introducing 39 bills and 3 resolutions while filing six committee reports on healthcare, health research, travel, homeland security, and aviation security matters.

onTheFloor.title: Reauthorize the ALS Act through fiscal year 2031
Establish the IMPROVE Initiative within the National Institutes of Health
Reorganize the Department of Homeland Security Engagement office
Establish funds for investments in aviation security
Assess terrorism threats posed by foreign terrorist organizations in major non-NATO allies

committees.topic: Hearing on Sunshine Protection Act of 2025, National Security and State Department Appropriations Act 2027, Veterans Act, and Privacy in Purchases Act

committees.committee: Committee on Veterans' Affairs Subcommittee on Technology Modernization
committees.topic: PACT Act Implementation: Modernizing VA Disability Claims Through Effective Technology
